---
title: "Experimental Economics"
description: "Lab and field experiments, oTree, classical replications, meta-analysis of behavioral findings."
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
---

::: {.topic-card-label}
<span data-topic-count="experimental-economics"></span> TUTORIALS
:::

# Experimental Economics

Lab and field experiments, oTree, classical replications, meta-analysis of behavioral findings.
